requirement_topic.en: ES Electrical Safety Standard — ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40 for Heat Pumps and Air-Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: ES电气安全标准——热泵和空调器ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40
requirement_topic.zht: ES電氣安全標準——熱泵和空調器ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40

summary.en: The Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS) publishes Egyptian Standard (ES) specifications substantially aligned to IEC standards. ES 6201, corresponding to IEC 60335-2-40 (Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers), is the applicable Egyptian safety standard for heat pump and split air-conditioner products. EOS conformity certification for these products is tested against ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40. Testing must be conducted by an EGAC-accredited laboratory or a laboratory recognised by EOS. Egypt operates on 220 V / 50 Hz (single-phase) and 380 V / 50 Hz (three-phase), which is electrically compatible with Chinese product specifications — no voltage or frequency re-engineering is required.
summary.zh: 埃及标准化与质量组织（EOS）发布与IEC标准基本接轨的埃及标准（ES）规范。ES 6201对应IEC 60335-2-40（家用和类似用途电器安全——热泵、空调器和除湿机的特殊要求），是适用于热泵和分体式空调产品的埃及安全标准。上述产品的EOS符合性认证依据ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40进行测试。测试须由EGAC认可实验室或EOS承认实验室执行。埃及采用220 V / 50 Hz（单相）和380 V / 50 Hz（三相），与中国产品规格在电气上完全兼容——无需重新进行电压或频率设计。
summary.zht: 埃及標準化與質量組織（EOS）發布與IEC標準基本接軌的埃及標準（ES）規範。ES 6201對應IEC 60335-2-40（家用和類似用途電器安全——熱泵、空調器和除濕機的特殊要求），是適用於熱泵和分體式空調產品的埃及安全標準。上述產品的EOS符合性認證依據ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40進行測試。測試須由EGAC認可實驗室或EOS承認實驗室執行。埃及採用220 V / 50 Hz（單相）和380 V / 50 Hz（三相），與中國產品規格在電氣上完全相容——無需重新進行電壓或頻率設計。

standards_or_laws: ES 6201 — Egyptian Standard aligned to IEC 60335-2-40 (heat pumps, air-conditioners, dehumidifiers)
IEC 60335-2-40 — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers
EOS conformity certification scheme — testing by EGAC-accredited or EOS-recognised laboratory
Egypt supply voltage: 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase), 50 Hz

summary.en: China's GB 4706.32 covers safety requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners, and dehumidifiers, substantially aligned to IEC 60335-2-40. CCC certification requires GB 4706.32 testing by a CNCA-designated laboratory. China also operates on 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) at 50 Hz, making Chinese products electrically compatible with Egyptian supply specifications. GB 25454 covers COP/SCOP efficiency metrics for heat pump products under CCC scope for units up to 40 kW.
summary.zh: 中国GB 4706.32涵盖热泵、空调器和除湿机的安全要求，与IEC 60335-2-40基本接轨。CCC认证要求由CNCA指定实验室依据GB 4706.32进行测试。中国同样采用50 Hz下的220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相），使中国产品与埃及供电规格在电气上完全兼容。GB 25454涵盖CCC范围内40 kW以内热泵产品的COP/SCOP能效指标。
summary.zht: 中國GB 4706.32涵蓋熱泵、空調器和除濕機的安全要求，與IEC 60335-2-40基本接軌。CCC認證要求由CNCA指定實驗室依據GB 4706.32進行測試。中國同樣採用50 Hz下的220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相），使中國產品與埃及供電規格在電氣上完全相容。GB 25454涵蓋CCC範圍內40 kW以內熱泵產品的COP/SCOP能效指標。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Safety requirements for heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers (aligned to IEC 60335-2-40)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for heat pumps up to 40 kW for domestic-market sale
GB 25454 — COP/SCOP efficiency baseline for heat pump products under CCC
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps
China supply voltage: 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase), 50 Hz

gap.en: GB 4706.32 and IEC 60335-2-40 are substantially aligned in technical content, which may reduce re-testing burden where test evidence against IEC 60335-2-40 is already available. However, CCC certificates and test reports from non-EGAC-accredited laboratories are not accepted by EOS. The exporter must supply ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40 test evidence from an EGAC-accredited or EOS-recognised laboratory to support the EOS conformity certificate. Grid voltage and frequency (220 V / 50 Hz) are identical — this is a genuine compatibility advantage requiring no electrical modification.
gap.zh: GB 4706.32与IEC 60335-2-40在技术内容上基本接轨，若已有针对IEC 60335-2-40的测试证据，可能降低重新测试负担。但CCC证书及非EGAC认可实验室出具的测试报告不被EOS接受。出口商须提供来自EGAC认可或EOS承认实验室的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40测试证据，以支持EOS符合性证书申请。电网电压和频率（220 V / 50 Hz）完全相同——这是真正的兼容性优势，无需进行电气改造。
gap.zht: GB 4706.32與IEC 60335-2-40在技術內容上基本接軌，若已有針對IEC 60335-2-40的測試證據，可能降低重新測試負擔。但CCC證書及非EGAC認可實驗室出具的測試報告不被EOS接受。出口商須提供來自EGAC認可或EOS承認實驗室的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40測試證據，以支持EOS符合性證書申請。電網電壓和頻率（220 V / 50 Hz）完全相同——這是真正的相容性優勢，無需進行電氣改造。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40 testing from EGAC-accredited laboratory required to support EOS conformity certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.32 / CCC required for domestic-market sale; not recognised by EOS for Egypt import

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moderate gap on certification path — GB 4706.32 and IEC 60335-2-40 are technically aligned, potentially easing re-test burden, but an EGAC-accredited lab test report under ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40 is required for EOS conformity certification; CCC is not accepted. Grid compatibility (220 V / 50 Hz) is an advantage — no electrical re-engineering required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 认证路径存在中等差距——GB 4706.32与IEC 60335-2-40技术上接轨，可能减轻重新测试负担，但EOS符合性认证需要EGAC认可实验室出具的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40测试报告；CCC不被接受。电网兼容性（220 V / 50 Hz）是一项优势——无需进行电气改造。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 認證路徑存在中等差距——GB 4706.32與IEC 60335-2-40技術上接軌，可能減輕重新測試負擔，但EOS符合性認證需要EGAC認可實驗室出具的ES 6201 / IEC 60335-2-40測試報告；CCC不被接受。電網相容性（220 V / 50 Hz）是一項優勢——無需進行電氣改造。
